Linear (Gaussian):

$$
\underbrace{\mu}_{\text{mean}}
\underset{\xleftarrow[]{=}}{\xrightarrow[]{=}}
\underbrace{\lincomp(\vx) }_{\atop{\text{linear}}{text{predictor}}}
= \dprodf{\vx}{\vb} + \mu(0)
$$

Logistic (Binomial):

$$
\underbrace{\mu}_{\text{mean}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\pi \cdot n]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\frac{\mu}{n}}
}
\underbrace{\pi}_{\text{probability}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\frac{\odds}{1+\odds}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
}
\underbrace{\odds}_{\text{odds}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\logodds}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\odds}}
}
\underbrace{\logodds}_{\text{log-odds}} = \dprodf{\vx}{\vb} + \logodds(0)
$$

Count (Poisson):

$$
\underbrace{\mu}_{\text{mean}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\rate \cdot t]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\mu / t}
}
\underbrace{\rate}_{\text{rate}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\lincomp}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\rate}}
}
\underbrace{\lincomp}_{\text{log-rate}}
= \dprodf{\vx}{\vb} + \rate(0)
$$

Survival (Cox PH):

$$
\underbrace{\mu}_{\text{mean}}
\xleftarrow[\int_{t=0}^{\infty}{\surv(t)dt}]{}
\underbrace{\surv(t)}_{\text{survival}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{-\cuhaz(t)}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{-\logf{\surv(t)}}
}
\underbrace{\cuhaz(t)}_{\text{\atop{cumulative}{hazard}}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\int_0^t \haz(u)\,du]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\haz(t)}
}
\underbrace{\haz(t)}_{\text{hazard}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\lincomp}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\haz(t)}}
}
\underbrace{\lincomp(t,\vx)}_{\text{log-hazard}}
= \dprodf{\vx}{\vb} + \loghaz_0(t)
$$
